headline.title: 美股高位震荡，市场静待美伊和平协议
headline.summary: 美国股市在历史高位附近持稳，交易员等待华盛顿与伊朗能否最终达成和平协议，恢复霍尔木兹海峡的石油运输。
headline.title_en: Stocks Steady at Highs as Traders Await Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: US stocks held steady at all-time highs as traders waited to see whether Washington and Iran could finally get a peace deal across the line and restore oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
headline.reason: 该新闻同时涉及国际地缘政治与金融市场两大核心板块，且对全球能源供应和经济预期有重大影响，是今日最具综合性和影响力的头条。
headline.reason_en: This story bridges geopolitics and financial markets, with significant implications for global energy supply and economic outlook, making it the most comprehensive and impactful lead of the day.
